summary: Use 52poke Pokemon Champions sprites as the closest regular team-preview templates when available, Bulbagarden Pokemon Champions shiny menu sprites for shiny variants, then PokeAPI Gen 8 68x56 icons, Scarlet/Violet sprites, Home artwork, and user-labeled local templates.
licenseNotes: PokeAPI/sprites states the repository is distributed under CC0 1.0 Universal.
The same license file also states image contents are Copyright The Pokemon Company.
52poke pages expose Pokemon Champions sprite files, but image rights still need review before public distribution.
Bulbagarden Archives exposes Pokemon Champions shiny menu sprite files, but image rights still need review before public distribution.
Keep downloaded image assets rebuildable and review distribution policy before shipping them in a public app.

pokemonApi.mappingReason: No separate neutral team-preview icon is expected; use shield form until a user-labeled template says otherwise.
Pokemon Showdown base name maps to PokeAPI male default.
Pokemon Showdown -F suffix maps to PokeAPI female form.
PokeAPI names the default size explicitly.
Pokemon Showdown base name maps to midday form.
Pokemon Showdown base Maushold maps to family-of-three; Maushold-Four maps to family-of-four.
Pokemon Showdown Maushold-Four maps to family-of-four.
Pokemon Showdown base name maps to male form.
Pokemon Showdown -F suffix maps to PokeAPI female form.
Champions custom form uses the PokeAPI female mega identifier when present.
Champions custom form uses the PokeAPI male mega identifier.
PokeAPI names the default disguise state explicitly.
PokeAPI names the default mode explicitly.
Pokemon Showdown base name maps to zero form.
Use the default Polteageist visual unless an antique-specific template is added.
Pokemon Showdown base name maps to male form.
Use default Sinistcha art unless a masterpiece-specific template is added.
PokeAPI includes breed suffix.
PokeAPI includes breed suffix.
PokeAPI includes breed suffix.
Use default Vivillon art unless a pattern-specific template is added.
Use default Vivillon art unless a pattern-specific template is added.
